name: Picsur
description: An easy to use image sharing service
compose:
name: slashnode-picsur
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:17.4
    container_name: picsur-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
      POSTGRES_DB: picsur
      POSTGRES_USER: picsuruser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: picsurpass
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql:rw
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/caramelfur/picsur:0.5.6
    container_name: picsur-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      PICSUR_PORT: '8286'
      PICSUR_DB_HOST: picsur-db
      PICSUR_DB_PORT: '5432'
      PICSUR_DB_USERNAME: picsuruser
      PICSUR_DB_PASSWORD: picsurpass
      PICSUR_DB_DATABASE: picsur
      PICSUR_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      PICSUR_MAX_FILE_SIZE: '128000000000'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8286:8286
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-picsur_db_data-db
